alography EEG is a non-invasive technique used to measure the electrical activity of the brain. The signals originate from neuron activity and are recorded via electrodes placed on a person's scalp. s. While DL techniques tend to outperform classical methods, the challenge is that it generally requires larger datasets and more computational resources. More importantly, DL model results tend to be less interpretable compared to the classical ML methods, which makes it difficult to justify its implementation. 2.3.1 Deep Lear

ine learning (ML) and deep learning (DL) techniques are used to achieve data science objectives, but they approach the task in different ways.
